params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, AccountId, Account.Name, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE StageName = 'Closed Won' AND CloseDate >= 2026-01-01 AND CloseDate <= 2026-03-31 AND Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' ORDER BY Owner.Name LIMIT 500
